revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月廿四]][[zh:四月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 24|qq=April 24}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Shōmei|ja|昇明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōmei|1=Shengming|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5370265}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|479|en|479|qid=Q30989|lt=479|1=479}} {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|qid=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Gao of Southern Qi|en|Emperor Gao of Southern Qi|qid=Q1194981|lt=Xiao Daocheng|1=Emperor Gao of Southern Qi}} receives the abdication of {{ill|Emperor Shun of Song|en|Emperor Shun of Song|qid=Q718210|lt=Shundi (Liu Song)|1=Emperor Shun of Song}} of the {{ill|Liu Song dynasty|en|Liu Song dynasty|qid=Q49697|lt=Liu Song dynasty|1=Liu Song dynasty}} and becomes Emperor Gao of the {{ill|Southern Qi|en|Southern Qi|qid=Q62456|lt=Southern Qi|1=Southern Qi}} , marking the end of the Song dynasty. * {{ill|Chōtoku|en|Chōtoku|qid=Q1327213|lt=Chōtoku|1=Chōtoku}} 2 (Julian {{ill|996|en|996|qid=Q23452|lt=996|1=996}} {{ill|May 14|en|May 14|qid=Q2561|lt=May 14|1=May 14}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Korechika|en|Fujiwara no Korechika|qid=Q5507530|lt=Fujiwara no Korechika|1=Fujiwara no Korechika}} , who competed with {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja|Fujiwara no Michinaga|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinaga|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for the position of {{ill|Kampaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kampaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}} , is demoted to {{ill|Dazai no Gon no Sochi|ja|大宰権帥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dazai no Gon no Sochi|1=Dazai-no-gon-no-sochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9891637}} due to Michinaga’s political maneuvers. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 11 (Julian {{ill|1583|en|1583|qid=Q6726|lt=1583|1=1583}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|qid=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}} ) – {{ill|Hashiba Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashiba Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q187550}} (later {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} ) attacks and captures {{ill|Fukui Castle|en|Fukui Castle|qid=Q1073692|lt=Kitanosho Castle|1=Fukui Castle}} in {{ill|Fukui (city)|en|Fukui (city)|qid=Q201618|lt=Fukui|1=Fukui (city)}} , leading to the suicide of {{ill|Shibata Katsuie|en|Shibata Katsuie|qid=Q707587|lt=Shibata Katsuie|1=Shibata Katsuie}} and {{ill|Oichi|en|Oichi|qid=Q635214|lt=Oichi|1=Oichi}} . * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} establishes the {{ill|Gaikoku Sōbugyō|ja|外国総奉行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gaikoku Sōbugyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 外国惣奉行|1=Gaikoku Sōbugyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11430375}} , an office overseeing foreign affairs. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}} {{ill|June 11|en|June 11|qid=Q2617|lt=June 11|1=June 11}} ) – {{ill|Yajima Kajiko|en|Yajima Kajiko|qid=Q8047006|lt=Yajima Kajiko|1=Yajima Kajiko}} , educator and social activist (+ {{ill|1925|en|1925|qid=Q18107|lt=1925|1=1925}} ). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}} ) – {{ill|Tomitaro Makino|en|Tomitaro Makino|qid=Q729955|lt=Makino Tomitarō|1=Tomitaro Makino}} , {{ill|botanist|ja|植物学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/botanist|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 植物学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Botany|qid=Q441}} (+ {{ill|1957|en|1957|qid=Q5311|lt=1957|1=1957}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Zhangwu|ja|章武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhangwu|1=Zhangwu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8011668}} 3 (Julian {{ill|223|en|223|qid=Q31243|lt=223|1=223}} {{ill|June 10|en|June 10|qid=Q2615|lt=June 10|1=June 10}} ) – {{ill|Liu Bei|en|Liu Bei|qid=Q245315|lt=Liu Bei|1=Liu Bei}} , emperor of {{ill|Shu Han|ja|蜀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shu Han|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 蜀漢|1=Shu Han|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q320925}} (* {{ill|161|en|161|qid=Q30277|lt=161|1=161}} ). * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 11 (Gregorian {{ill|1583|en|1583|qid=Q6726|lt=1583|1=1583}} {{ill|June 14|en|June 14|qid=Q2612|lt=June 14|1=June 14}} ) – {{ill|Shibata Katsuie|en|Shibata Katsuie|qid=Q707587|lt=Shibata Katsuie|1=Shibata Katsuie}} {{Sfn|Takayanagi|2001|pp=232-233|qq=}} , {{ill|samurai|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1522|en|1522|qid=Q6299|lt=1522|1=1522}} ). * Tenshō 11 (Gregorian 1583 June 14) – {{ill|Oichi|en|Oichi|qid=Q635214|lt=Oichi|1=Oichi}} (also known as Kodani no Kata), younger sister of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} and wife of {{ill|Azai Nagamasa|en|Azai Nagamasa|qid=Q1142446|lt=Azai Nagamasa|1=Azai Nagamasa}} and Shibata Katsuie (* {{ill|1548|en|1548|qid=Q6551|lt=1548|1=1548}} ). * {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna (Japan)|1=Yuanhe}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1620|en|1620|qid=Q6810|lt=1620|1=1620}} {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}} ) – {{ill|William Adams (samurai)|en|William Adams (samurai)|qid=Q313866|lt=William Adams (pilot)|1=William Adams (samurai)}} ({{ill|Miura Anjin|ja|三浦按針|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miura Anjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ウィリアム・アダムス|1=William Adams (samurai)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q313866}} ), navigator and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} 's diplomatic advisor (* {{ill|1564|en|1564|qid=Q6632|lt=1564|1=1564}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 1 (Gregorian {{ill|1818|en|1818|qid=Q6964|lt=1818|1=1818}} {{ill|May 28|en|May 28|qid=Q2588|lt=May 28|1=May 28}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Harusato|en|Matsudaira Harusato|qid=Q11530504|lt=Matsudaira Harusato|1=Matsudaira Harusato}} (Fumai){{Sfn|Momokigi|1918|p=2|qq=}} , {{ill|daimyō|ja|藩主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/daimyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藩|1=Han system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q841985}} of {{ill|Matsue Domain|en|Matsue Domain|qid=Q1017072|lt=Matsue Domain|1=Matsue Domain}} and {{ill|tea master|ja|茶人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/tea master|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 茶人人物一覧|1=list of Tea masters|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11617948}} (* {{ill|1751|en|1751|qid=Q7615|lt=1751|1=1751}} ). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|23|4|25|3|24|5|4|0424|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
